vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: The finding involves updating the chrony configuration file to use the 'server' directive instead of 'pool' or other directives. This is a standard configuration hardening step for NTP clients and is unlikely to cause system instability or lockout, provided the correct time source is maintained.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: Incorrect time source configuration could lead to clock drift if the new server directive points to an unreachable or incorrect NTP server.

previous_attempts.scan_output: Single-rule scan failed for chronyd_server_directive (rule=xccdf_org.ssgproject.content_rule_chronyd_server_directive). Could not verify.
